title: Configuring shinyresults
text: appResults Shiny app exploring visualizing time series modelling results (mainly MAgPIE REMIND). configured via R option called appResults typically set .Rprofile.

title: Configuring shinyresults
text: Create named list one entry per model pass options(appResults = ...). entry list fields:

title: Configuring shinyresults
text: actual MAgPIE / REMIND configuration values, check internal wiki page.
code: url <- "https://rse.pik-potsdam.de/data/magpie/results/rev1"  options(appResults = list(   MAgPIE = list(     file          = paste0(url, "/reduced_overview.rds"),     resultsfolder = url,     valfile       = c(       "H12" = paste0(url, "/validation.rds"),       "H16" = paste0(url, "/validation_H16.rds")     ),     username      = "myuser",     password      = "mypassword"   ) ))

title: Configuring shinyresults
text: list contains one model, appResults prompt choose model explore startup:
code: options(appResults = list(   MAgPIE = list(file = "...", resultsfolder = "...", valfile = "..."),   REMIND = list(file = "...", resultsfolder = "...", valfile = "...") ))

title: Configuring shinyresults
text: can override config field named arguments passed appResults: arguments: readFilePar — TRUE read report files parallel (faster), FALSE (default) sequential reading. variableConfig — path custom YAML file variable presets (see ). NULL uses default config. port — port number Shiny app (default 3838). fixed port makes bookmarked URLs stable.

title: Configuring shinyresults
text: Use selectionSets define shortcuts common filter selections. entry maps filter column named list value vectors:
code: options(appResults = list(   MAgPIE = list(     file          = "...",     resultsfolder = "...",     selectionSets = list(       region = list(         "All EUR regions" = c("EUC", "EUS", "EUW", "DEU"),         "Global"          = "GLO"       )     )   ) ))

title: Configuring shinyresults
text: appResults loads variable presets populate Dashboard tab quick-load menus plot tabs. lookup order : Explicit path passed via variableConfig. User config ~/.shinyresults/variables.yaml. Package default (inst/extdata/variables_default.yaml). configuration file looks like : preset name, optional description, list variables entries variable (variable name) plot_type (defaults "line").
code: meta:   version: "1.0"   description: "My custom presets"  presets:   land_cover:     name: "Land Cover"     description: "Land cover types and changes"     variables:       - variable: "Resources|Land Cover|+|Cropland"         plot_type: "line"       - variable: "Resources|Land Cover|+|Forest"         plot_type: "line"    emissions:     name: "GHG Emissions"     variables:       - variable: "Emissions|CO2|Land|+|Land-use Change"         plot_type: "line"

title: appResults — appResults
text: appResults allows explore visualize time series modelling results.

title: appResults — appResults
code: appResults(   cfg = getOption("appResults"),   readFilePar = FALSE,   variableConfig = NULL,   port = 3838,   ... )

title: appResults — appResults
text: cfg config-file containing information one models items listed .            Usually provide settings .Rprofile list constructed follows            (explore REMIND results please replace occurrences magpie remind):            url <- https://rse.pik-potsdam.de/data/magpie/results/rev1            options(appResults = list(MAgPIE = list(file = paste0(url, "/reduced_overview.rds"),                                                    resultsfolder=url,                                                    valfile=paste0(url, "/validation.rds"),                                                    username="xxx",                                                    password="yyy"))) file - Overview file rds format containing list runs available.                   get access available filters use overview.rds (takes 15s longer load)                   instead reduced_overview.rds.            resultsfolder - folder model results stored rds format.            valfile - validation data. Can CSV/MIF file rds file quitte object                      (saved saveRDS). NULL default; case user can upload                      files directly tool. Can also named character vector                      multiple validation files.            username - username access "file" "resultsfolder".            password - password access "file" "resultsfolder".            selectionSets - named list selection sets per filter column.                   element named list mapping set labels character vectors values.                   Example: list(region = list("EUR regions" = c("EUC", "EUS", "EUW", "DEU"))) readFilePar read report data files parallel (faster) (TRUE) sequence (FALSE) variableConfig Path YAML configuration file variable presets, NULL use default config. config defines presets Dashboard tab quick-load options plot tabs. See loadVariableConfig. port Port number Shiny app (default: 3838). Using fixed port allows consistent URLs bookmarking. ... additional information overwrite one settings cfg directly: file, resultsfolder, valfile, username, password, selectionSets.

title: appResults — appResults
text: Florian Humpenoeder, Jan Philipp Dietrich, Lavinia Baumstark, Pascal Sauer

title: appResultsLocal — appResultsLocal
text: version appResults optimized run local model folder. contrast appResults, appResultsLocal requires path output folder (subfolders run).

title: appResultsLocal — appResultsLocal
text: folder output folder containing runs analyzed subfolders (e.g. folder "output" MAgPIE model folder) valfile Path validation file, preferably rds format, can also provided mif (latter case converted rds first). path given function look automatically validation file output folder

title: appResultsLocal — appResultsLocal
text: Jan Philipp Dietrich, Lavinia Baumstark

title: Load Variable Configuration — loadVariableConfig
text: Loads variable configuration YAML file fallback hierarchy. function searches configuration following order: 1. Explicit path provided via configFile parameter 2. User config ~/.shinyresults/variables.yaml 3. Package default inst/extdata/variables_default.yaml

title: modFilter Module — modFilter

title: modFilter Module — modFilter
code: modFilter(   id,   data,   exclude = NULL,   showAll = FALSE,   multiple = NULL,   xdata = NULL,   xdataExclude = NULL,   order = NULL,   name = NULL,   preselectYear = NULL,   preselectMinDate = NULL,   selectionSets = NULL )

title: modFilter Module — modFilter
text: id Module ID string, must match id used modFilterUI data reactive returning data.table observations rows filter options columns exclude names columns used filter showAll FALSE | set TRUE available filter shown filter selector hidden multiple vector booleans filter defining whether multiple selections allowed . information provided assumed multiple selection allowed xdata additional data.tables filtered rules data. provided format return value changes xdataExclude similar exclude vector filters ignored xdata. Useful xdata filtered subset filters applied data order order filter listed (provided vector filter names). Filter listed shown ones mentioned. name name used identify filter log preselectYear provided year filter preselected value preselectMinDate provided date filter preselected lower value selectionSets named list selection sets per filter column. element named list mapping set labels character vectors values. set selected, member values added selection. sets members present data shown. Example: list(region = list("EUR regions" = c("EUC", "EUS", "EUW", "DEU")))

title: modFilter Module — modFilter
text: reactive list x filtered data xdata containing list additional, filtered data element.

title: modRunSelect Module — modRunSelect
text: id Module ID string, must match id used modRunSelectUI file report data. Can CSV/MIF file rds file quitte object (saved saveRDS). file can also vector rds files. NULL default; case user can upload files directly tool resultsfolder folder MAgPIE run results stored. File must come overview list called "files" username username used access file resultsfolder password password access file resultsfolder readFilePar read report data files parallel (faster) (TRUE) sequence (FALSE) restoreIds reactive containing run IDs restore bookmarked URL (optional) lassoIds reactive containing run IDs selected via lasso/box selection stats plot (optional)
